Video.summary: This documentary explores how a group of surfers revolutionized surfing in 1975.
Video.title: Bustin' Down The Door

Video.summary: Take a look behind the scenes at the characters involved in Andy Irons: Kissed By God.
Video.title: Andy Irons: Kissed by God - Raw Outtakes

Image.alt: Andy Irons: Kissed by God - Raw Outtakes
Andy Irons: Kissed by God - Raw Outtakes

Video.summary: The artistic and cinematic tale of Jay Phillips, one of Australia's greatest surfing talents.
Video.title: Jay Phillips Isn't Dead

Video.summary: An interpretation of our lifestyle, culture, riding waves, and traveling the world.
Video.title: Dear Suburbia

Video.summary: Dirty Old Wedge is the real life story of the world's most infamous shorebreak and those who live it
Video.title: Dirty Old Wedge

Video.summary: This is our bookmark. Our full stop. It is an actual document of individuality and modern surfing and living and romping and laughing. Collect it and recollect on it. Here we are now, entertain us. And well take it from there.
Video.title: Cluster

Video.summary: L E N A documents the purpose and persistent journey of the first German female big wave surfer.
Video.title: LENA

Video.summary: Witness the large waves from Hurricane Marie that were pounding the Southern California coast.
Video.title: A Wedge to Remember

Video.summary: He was the world's first Olympic surfing gold medalist. Can the Brazilian surfing sensation Ítalo Ferreira now wrap up the World Surf League Championship Tour title for the second successive time?
Video.title: The Curious Tales of Italo Ferreira

Image.alt: The Curious Tales of Italo Ferreira
The Curious Tales of Italo Ferreira

Video.summary: Inside Kai Lenny’s life: from kiteboarding to big waves, he’s mastered every water sport.
Video.title: Paradigm Lost

Video.summary: Is Frank Solomon a kind-hearted surfer or a hard-living bad boy? The man and myth may be inseparable.
Video.title: Let's Be Frank

Video.summary: Taylor and his surfer buddies think they have struck gold when he inherits a mansion by the beach.
Video.title: Ghost Babe

Video.summary: Explore Honolulu’s pristine waves, culture, community, and deep Hawaiian heritage.
Video.title: Honolulu

Video.summary: Florida’s long coast, heavy waves, and champ pedigree make it a best-kept surfing secret.
Video.title: Florida

Video.summary: Shot on16mm film, Return To Zero explores the theme of life, death and reincarnation through a surfboard.
Video.title: Return to Zero

Video.summary: Japan blends tradition, technology, and quality swell to emerge as a surf hotspot.
Video.title: Japan

Video.summary: From Eastern Suburbs to Northern Beaches, dive into Sydney’s vibrant surf culture.
Video.title: Sydney

Video.summary: The Essence of Surfing is a riveting surf documentary that gets to the heart of why surfing is the greatest sport in the world. Featuring surfers of all kinds, from the neighborhood grom to some of the greatest surfers to ever live, The Essence of Surfing uncovers what it is about this awesome sport that makes it a necessary part of each of their lives. Shot in the world's most beautiful locations by top notch Cinematographers Erik Ippel and Mike Prickett, this film is sure to hook and inspire anyone looking to get wet and catch some waves.
Video.title: The Essence of Surfing

Video.summary: The story of iconic professional surfers and identical twins CJ & Damien Hobgood. Their sibling rivalry and struggle to each establish their own identity fueled their careers, but ripped their personal and peripheral relationships apart.
Video.title: And Two If By Sea

Video.summary: Singlefin Yellow tells the story of one surfboards life as it travels the globe shared by a group of friends.
Video.title: SingleFin: Yellow

Video.summary: Be on the inside of how these parks and tech are put together.
Video.title: Pilot - Part 1

Video.summary: Surfing filmmaker Jason Baffa explains the unexpected perils of getting your dream job.
Video.title: Jason Baffa's Surf Masterpieces

Video.summary: Featuring the original six from Mod Coll and introducing surfing's newest guns. With its emphasis on performance and struck to a soundtrack that veers across all genres, Lost Atlas is the must-see surf film of 2011.
Video.title: Lost Atlas

Video.summary: Ice Edge follows surfers shaping ice boards, battling nature in a poetic tribute to Lofoten.
Video.title: Ice Edge

Video.summary: Torren Martyn and Simon Jones craft Calypte, a board born from adventure and a decade-long bond.
Video.title: The Ugly Duckling with Simon Jones & Torren Martyn

Image.alt: The Ugly Duckling with Simon Jones & Torren Martyn
The Ugly Duckling with Simon Jones & Torren Martyn
The Ugly Duckling with Simon Jones & Torren Martyn

Video.summary: At 50, Twiggy Baker tests Axel Lorentz's boards in giant waves, chasing another world title.
Video.title: On Edge with Axel Lorentz & Grant 'Twiggy' Baker

Image.alt: On Edge with Axel Lorentz & Grant 'Twiggy' Baker
On Edge with Axel Lorentz & Grant 'Twiggy' Baker
On Edge with Axel Lorentz & Grant 'Twiggy' Baker

Video.summary: William Aliotti tests a Santa Barbara board, proving distance can't hinder growth or performance.
Video.title: Parlez Between with Ryan Lovelace & William Aliotti

Image.alt: Parlez Between with Ryan Lovelace & William Aliotti
Parlez Between with Ryan Lovelace & William Aliotti
Parlez Between with Ryan Lovelace & William Aliotti

Video.summary: Trevor Gordon builds a surfboard in 2 days, sails the Atlantic, and rides waves with it.
Video.title: Yardfish with Trevor Gordon

Video.summary: Tyler Warren and Ian Gottron chase dreams at J-Bay, testing a reimagined classic fish design.
Video.title: Thanks Steve with Ian Gottron & Tyler Warren

Image.alt: Thanks Steve with Ian Gottron & Tyler Warren
Thanks Steve with Ian Gottron & Tyler Warren
Thanks Steve with Ian Gottron & Tyler Warren

Video.summary: Roam highlights the lifestyle of surfers who dedicate themselves to traveling and finding new, perfect waves.
Video.title: Roam
